name: Chocolate Oatmeal Cookies
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Quick cooking or regular oats
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a large mixing bowl, beat together butter and sugars until light and fluffy. Blend in eggs and vanilla extract.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together flour, cocoa, baking soda, and salt.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the butter mixture, stirring well after each addition.
5. Stir in oats and chopped nuts. The batter will be stiff.
6. Drop rounded tablespoonfuls of batter onto ungreased cookie sheets.
7. Bake for 11-12 minutes or until set but still slightly moist in the center. Do not overbake.
8. Let cookies cool on the baking sheet for 1 minute before transferring them to a wire rack to cool completely.
